fire_rating.ul_design: UL D916 / UL X772 (beam and column designs must be compatible at intersection)

components.name: Column (WF or HSS)
components.description: Vertical column member receiving beam connection. Column fireproofing must be continuous through connection zone.

properties.continuity_note: Column SFRM must not be interrupted by beam connection

components.name: Beam (Wide Flange)
components.description: Horizontal beam member framing into column. Beam fireproofing must terminate at or transition into column fireproofing.

components.name: Connection Plates and Bolts
components.description: Shear tab, end plate, clip angles, and/or moment plates with high-strength bolts forming the beam-to-column connection. All hardware must be encapsulated in SFRM.

components.name: Continuous SFRM Coverage at Connection
components.description: SFRM must provide uninterrupted coverage through the entire beam-to-column connection zone. No exposed steel permitted at plates, bolts, or transition areas.

properties.thickness_at_connection: Match thicker of beam or column SFRM requirement
properties.coverage_note: All bolts, plates, welds, and copes must be fully encapsulated
properties.transition_method: Feather SFRM from beam thickness to column thickness over 6-inch zone

components.name: Transition Zones
components.description: Areas where beam SFRM meets column SFRM — thickness and profile may differ. Transition must be smooth with no voids or thin spots.

properties.inspection_note: Verify thickness at transition with pin gauge — this is a common deficiency area

assembly_constraints.description: SFRM coverage must be continuous through beam-column intersection with no exposed steel
assembly_constraints.rule: Zero tolerance for bare steel at connections — verify 100% coverage at all bolt heads, plate edges, and coped areas

assembly_constraints.description: Where beam and column have different SFRM thickness requirements, use the greater thickness through the connection zone
assembly_constraints.rule: Connection zone thickness = max(beam SFRM thickness, column SFRM thickness)

assembly_constraints.description: Coped beam ends expose additional steel surface area that must be fireproofed
assembly_constraints.rule: SFRM must cover all exposed surfaces of coped beam ends including cope return cuts

assembly_constraints.description: Verify spray access to all surfaces in tight connection zones — back side of connection may require hand-packing
assembly_constraints.rule: Where spray nozzle cannot reach, SFRM may be hand-packed (trowel applied) per manufacturer allowance
